alert: Latency is elevated across web and cache-backed pages.
root_cause: database read latency causing cascading service latency

evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:web_server: Web metrics show broad latency but low direct error rate.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:database: Database read query latency is the highest saturated metric.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:database: Database logs show repeated slow read queries.

logs: WARN slow read query table=product_inventory latency_ms=2400

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(database read latency causing cascading service latency, enable database read replica)
distractors: Cache is healthy; it is not the source of the cascading latency.
